signals.evidence: Jennifer Klein PT, native Houstonian, 'practiced her profession here since 1987' per about page. UT Medical Branch PT grad → ~62. 38-yr tenure squarely in natural-exit window.
Practice combines outpatient PT with AATB Pilates studio. Pilates is recurring/membership revenue. Has MBA from Our Lady of the Lake, suggesting business sophistication.

Live team page fetch (jenniferkleinphysicaltherapy.com/about/, 2026-05-17): Jennifer Klein is the only PT listed. Two Pilates instructors named (Mima Leal, Patty Schnabel) — Pilates instructors are NOT successor candidates for a PT practice in TX (cannot legally own a PT practice). No 2nd PT, no DPT, no family member, no DSO branding. 38-yr solo founder profile.
Single Houston Heights location since founding, no satellite offices, no expansion narrative.

layer1_comment: Jennifer Klein, PT, MBA, est. ~62 (website self-report: 'practiced here since 1987' + UTMB PT BS implies grad year ~1986). 38-yr personally-running tenure. Tenure modifier +5 → strong base rate.
layer2_comment: 38-yr outpatient PT + Pilates studio. Solo PT clinic (1 PT, 2 Pilates instructors). MBA-holder suggests business sophistication. Plausible $400K–$700K rev (solo PT + cash Pilates). SBA-financeable. Clean license per website.
layer3_comment: Coasting tells: (1) solo PT verified live-fetch — no associate PT, no successor; (2) single location since founding; (3) website is functional but not modern (basic info pages, no online portal evident). Owner is sole PT carrying caseload + business mgr.
layer4_comment: Houston Heights = inner-loop Harris (+3 nudge). PT is top-5 ETA vertical per Stanford Search Fund Study; SBA 7(a) financeable. Houston PT roll-up active (ATI, USPH, Athletico, Confluent all bolt-on). Pilates studio = unusual add for traditional PT buyers but cash flow asset for ETA buyer.
final_comment: Jennifer Klein, PT, MBA, founded Jennifer Klein PT + AATB Pilates in Houston Heights in 1987 (38 yrs). Live team-page fetch (jenniferkleinphysicaltherapy.com/about/) confirms she is the sole licensed PT — Pilates instructors named are not successor candidates per TX licensure. Single Houston Heights location, single PT, MBA-holder running her own shop for 38 years — classic settled-owner profile. Age verification is website-self-report only (no OV65, no voter), capping confidence. Tier B (forward): hand to PT-focused ETA / search-fund buyer; tilt the thesis toward the Pilates studio as a recurring-cash-flow add.
value_add_thesis: Acquire from outright-retiring solo owner; modernize PMS to WebPT or Jane App with online intake/booking; add 2 associate DPTs (Heights/Memorial DPT supply is strong); operationalize the AATB Pilates studio as a recurring-revenue franchise model (memberships, semi-private classes, online community). Owner has the MBA — financials should be cleanly presentable. 1.5–2× EBITDA path in 18–24 months.
